raw_consumer_statement: The merchant is XXXX, my purchase was for a " Drill Bit Sharpener '' on XX/XX/2025 for {$160.00}. The merchant provided false tracking numbers with both USPS and XXXX. The item associated with XXXX of these tracking numbers weighed only XXXX XXXX, the " Drill Bit Sharpener '' weighs ~ XXXX XXXX. I disputed the charge for non-delivery of goods and provided details of the false tracking-numbers/shipments. Although I have provided extensive documentation of this fraud, I have been denied a refund by both the merchant and my CITIBANK credit card.
